checks.name: SAST scan (semgrep)
checks.details:
┌─────────────────┐
│ 4 Code Findings │
└─────────────────┘
                                                     
    scripts/evidence/capture-progress-screenshots.mjs
     ❱ javascript.audit.detect-replaceall-sanitization.detect-replaceall-sanitization
          ❰❰ Blocking ❱❱
          Detected a call to `replaceAll()` in an attempt to HTML escape the string `value`. Manually    
          sanitizing input through a manually built list can be circumvented in many situations, and it's
          better to use a well known sanitization library such as `sanitize-html` or `DOMPurify`.        
          Details: https://sg.run/AzoB                                                                   
                                                                                                         
           29┆ return value
           30┆   .replaceAll('&', '&')
            ⋮┆----------------------------------------
     ❱ javascript.audit.detect-replaceall-sanitization.detect-replaceall-sanitization
          ❰❰ Blocking ❱❱
          Detected a call to `replaceAll()` in an attempt to HTML escape the string `value                 
          .replaceAll('&', '&')`. Manually sanitizing input through a manually built list can be       
          circumvented in many situations, and it's better to use a well known sanitization library such as
          `sanitize-html` or `DOMPurify`.                                                                  
          Details: https://sg.run/AzoB                                                                     
                                                                                                           
           29┆ return value
           30┆   .replaceAll('&', '&')
           31┆   .replaceAll('<', '<')
            ⋮┆----------------------------------------
     ❱ javascript.audit.detect-replaceall-sanitization.detect-replaceall-sanitization
          ❰❰ Blocking ❱❱
          Detected a call to `replaceAll()` in an attempt to HTML escape the string `value               
          .replaceAll('&', '&')     .replaceAll('<', '<')`. Manually sanitizing input through a   
          manually built list can be circumvented in many situations, and it's better to use a well known
          sanitization library such as `sanitize-html` or `DOMPurify`.                                   
          Details: https://sg.run/AzoB                                                                   
                                                                                                         
           29┆ return value
           30┆   .replaceAll('&', '&')
           31┆   .replaceAll('<', '<')
           32┆   .replaceAll('>', '>')
            ⋮┆----------------------------------------
     ❱ javascript.audit.detect-replaceall-sanitization.detect-replaceall-sanitization
          ❰❰ Blocking ❱❱
          Detected a call to `replaceAll()` in an attempt to HTML escape the string `value               
          .replaceAll('&', '&')     .replaceAll('<', '<')     .replaceAll('>', '>')`. Manually 
          sanitizing input through a manually built list can be circumvented in many situations, and it's
          better to use a well known sanitization library such as `sanitize-html` or `DOMPurify`.
